questions.question:

(S2) F=\(\Sigma\)(0,1,2,3,7)
(S3) F=\(\Pi\)(4,5,6)
(S4) F=\(\Pi\)(0,1,2,3,7)

questions.question:

X#Y=X'+Y' where X and Y are Boolean variables.

(S2) Q # R = R # Q
